title: COLOR&GEOMETRY Soft Non Slip Absorbent Shower Bath Mat, Machine Washable Bath Mat, 40 x 60 cm (Light Blue White)
features: SUPERIOR ABSORBENCY: This bath mat is designed with highly absorbent materials that quickly soak up water, reducing the risk of slippery floors and keeping your bathroom dry and clean after every use
LUXURIOUS SOFTNESS: Experience the dense comfort of this bathroom mat under your feet, featuring a substantial, cushioned design that provides a gentle touch and a spa-like feel in your bathroom

GRIP SECURITY: This anti slip bath mat features a secure non-slip backing that keeps the mat firmly in place on different surfaces, ensuring safety and stability while you step out of the bath or shower

MACHINE WASHABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN: This bathroom rug is well-made, bendable and fade-resistant, which allows you to machine wash it on gentle as often as needed; when it gets dirty, simply toss it (in a laundry mesh bag) in the washing machine for quick and hassle-free cleaning; when it is not in use, please hang it in a ventilated or sunny place to keep dry

BEAUTIFUL DÉCOR AND FUNCTIONAL: Designed in simple geometry patterns and in neutral colors, this bathroom carpet can go with different kinds of decor style; having lots of sizes to choose from, small, standard, large or runner, you can easily find one to fit in front of the single or double sinks, showers, bathtubs, vanities and more
